specification: A library must have a non-empty address.
A library must have at least one book.

ocl: context Library inv: books->forAll(l1,l2|l1<>l2 and l1.author=l2.author implies l1.title<>l2.title)
specification: In a library, if two books have the same author, then their titles must be different.

ocl: context Library inv: authors->forAll(a1,a2|a1<>a2 implies a1.name<>a2.name)
specification: In a library, all authors must have unique full names.
A book must have at least one author.
A loan must have a start date.
A loan must have an end date.
A loan must be associated with a member.
A loan must have an associated copy.
A fine must have an associated loan.
A fine must have a non-null date associated with it.
The fine amount should equal the number of days exceeded multiplied by 10.
An author must have a non-empty full name.
An author must have at least one book.
